summary: Comment Lua code with a special flavor of markdown and generate documentation for multiple formats (wiki for git repos and vim help file) etc.
raw_content: Comment Lua code with a special flavor of markdown and generate documentation for multiple formats (wiki for git repos and vim help file) etc.
generated_summary: howl is a library for generating documentation and parsing markdown complete usually used in the fields of doc, markdown, parser.
phase1: A Lua library for commenting and generating documentation for Lua code with a special flavor of markdown.
phase2: Supports multiple formats including wiki for git repos and vim help file.
phase3: Generates documentation for Lua code with markdown comments, suitable for project documentation and version control.
